free_text: Study of the P-31(He3,p)S-33 reaction.
The targets were prepared by vacuum evaporation of
Zn3P2 onto thin carbon backings. On the Zn3P2 layer a
thin overlay of Au was evaporated, which prevented a
loss of phosphorus by evaporation during bombardment.
The measured areal density of the phosphorus was
approx. 70 mug/cm**2.
16 Si surface-barrier detectors.
*EN-RSL*.The overall experimental resolution due to
target thickness, detector resolution, finite angular
acceptance, energy straggling in the aluminum foils
and electronics was approximately 160 keV.
.DWBA analysis.
.Proton spectrum from the P-31(He3,p)S-33
reaction was observed.
.The error bars is typical statistical errors
and uncertainties in the subtraction of background and
in the determination of the solid angles.
.The error assigned to the absolute differential
cross section is 20% and is due to inaccuracies in the
target thickness and in the beam current integration.
By CAJAD
